zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hastings於大約1352年出生時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Hastings17歲，母親Margaret Everingham22歲。她和John Rochford至少有2個女兒。她去世於大約1409年在英國林可爾史爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾巴林斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hastings于大约1352年出生时，她的父亲Sir Hugh de Hastings17岁，母亲Margaret Everingham22岁。她和John Rochford至少有2个女儿。她去世于大约1409年在英国林可爾史爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾巴林斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hastings was born about 1352, her father, Sir Hugh de Hastings, was 17 and her mother, Margaret Everingham, was 22. She had at least 2 daughters with John Rochford. She died about 1409, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Barlings, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Hastings est née environ 1352, son père, Sir Hugh de Hastings, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret Everingham, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John Rochford. Elle est décédée environ 1409, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Barlings, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Hastings um 1352 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh de Hastings 17 und ihre Mutter Margaret Everingham 22. Sie hatte mit John Rochford mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1409 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Barlings, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hastings è nata il circa 1352, sua padre, Sir Hugh de Hastings, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Margaret Everingham, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con John Rochford. Morì circa 1409, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Barlings, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hastingsが約1352年に生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Hastingsは17歳，母Margaret Everinghamは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Rochfordとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1409年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアバーリングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hastings(이)가 대략 1352년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Hastings(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Everingham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Rochford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1409년 영국 링코실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 발링스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1352, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Hastings, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Everingham, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com John Rochford. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1409, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Barlings, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hastings родилась около 1352 г., её отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Hastings было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Everingham, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John Rochford. Она умерла около 1409 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности барлингс, линколншир, Англия.
